seoTitle: Rohm Solutions | EV, Solar, Industrial Power | LiTong
seoDescription: Explore Rohm power solutions for electric vehicles, solar inverters, and industrial applications. SiC reference designs and Selection guidance.

faqs.question: What solution categories does Rohm offer?
faqs.answer: Rohm offers comprehensive power solutions across three key categories: Electric Vehicle solutions including traction inverters, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters utilizing SiC MOSFETs and modules for maximum efficiency; Solar and Renewable Energy solutions featuring high-efficiency solar inverters and energy storage systems; and Industrial Power solutions encompassing motor drives, power supplies, and welding equipment. Each solution includes reference designs, evaluation kits, and comprehensive technical documentation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solution categories below or contact our FAE team for Selection guidance and customized recommendations.

faqs.question: Does Rohm provide reference designs for EV applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rohm provides comprehensive EV reference designs: (1) Traction inverters - Complete inverter designs with SiC modules for 400V and 800V systems. (2) Onboard chargers - 11kW and 22kW OBC reference designs using SiC MOSFETs. (3) DC-DC converters - HV to LV converter designs. (4) Documentation - Full schematics, BOM, and layout files. (5) Software - Control algorithms and firmware. (6) Automotive - AEC-Q101 qualified devices. (7) Support - FAE support for customization. Reference designs accelerate EV power system development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with Rohm reference designs to accelerate your EV power system development.

faqs.question: What makes Rohm solutions ideal for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Rohm automotive solution advantages: (1) Mass production proven - Millions of devices in EVs on the road. (2) AEC-Q101 qualified - Full automotive qualification. (3) IATF 16949 - Automotive quality system. (4) Easy gate drive - Compatible with standard drivers. (5) Low Rds(on) - Industry-leading efficiency. (6) Reliability - Zero defect quality target. (7) Support - Dedicated automotive FAE team. Rohm is a trusted automotive supplier with proven track record.
faqs.decisionGuide: Choose Rohm for automotive solutions with proven mass production experience.

solutions.title: Electric Vehicle Powertrain
solutions.subtitle: High-Efficiency Traction Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: Rohm SiC MOSFETs and modules enable next-generation EV traction inverters with industry-leading efficiency for 400V and 800V systems.
solutions.longDescription: Rohm's EV traction inverter solutions leverage proprietary trench-gate SiC MOSFET technology to deliver unprecedented performance. With industry-leading low Rds(on) and easy gate drive compatibility, these solutions are ideal for demanding EV applications. The solutions include comprehensive reference designs, gate driver recommendations, thermal management guidelines, and control algorithms. Rohm's automotive-qualified devices meet AEC-Q101 standards with full PPAP support and mass production proven reliability.
benefits: Easy gate drive with standard 15V/18V drivers
Mass production proven in major OEM platforms
Extended EV range through higher efficiency

bomList.description: Isolated gate driver for SiC MOSFETs

faeInsights.content: Rohm's SiC MOSFETs are exceptional for EV traction inverters. The SCT3022AL's 22mΩ Rds(on) is industry-leading for 650V devices, enabling 99%+ efficiency. For 800V systems, the SCT3080KL has proven mass production reliability. The easy gate drive compatibility is a major advantage - no special drivers needed. I highly recommend Rohm for automotive applications requiring proven reliability.
keyTakeaways: Mass production proven in major OEM platforms
Easy gate drive with standard 18V drivers
recommendations: Start with Rohm reference designs for fastest time to market
Use Kelvin source packages for maximum switching performance
Contact LiTong FAE for design review and optimization

faqs.question: What power levels can Rohm EV traction inverters support?
faqs.answer: Rohm EV traction inverter power levels: (1) Compact EVs - 50-100kW using discrete devices like SCT3022AL. (2) Mid-size EVs - 100-200kW with SCT3080KL or parallel configurations. (3) Full-size EVs - 200-300kW using BSM300D12P2E001 modules. (4) Performance EVs - 300kW+ with parallel modules. (5) Voltage - 400V and 800V battery systems supported. (6) Efficiency - 98-99% achievable across all power levels. (7) Scalability - Modular designs allow easy power scaling. Rohm solutions cover the full range of EV applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select discrete devices for <150kW; power modules for >150kW or high-volume production.

faqs.question: How does Rohm SiC improve EV range compared to IGBT?
faqs.answer: Rohm SiC vs IGBT EV range improvement: (1) Efficiency gain - 2-3% higher inverter efficiency with low Rds(on). (2) Loss reduction - 70% lower switching losses. (3) Range impact - 5-10% improvement in EV range. (4) Battery savings - Smaller battery for same range. (5) Cooling - Reduced cooling system power. (6) Weight - Lighter inverter reduces vehicle weight. (7) Cost - System cost savings offset device cost. Rohm SiC traction inverters maximize EV range.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rohm SiC provides 5-10% range improvement; essential for premium EVs.

faqs.question: What makes Rohm's easy gate drive a key advantage?
faqs.answer: Rohm easy gate drive advantages: (1) Standard drivers - Works with 15V/18V standard drivers. (2) No negative bias - 0V turn-off sufficient. (3) Wide margin - Compatible with most gate drivers. (4) Lower cost - No special driver needed. (5) Faster design - Reduced development time. (6) Flexibility - Easy to source drivers. (7) Reliability - Proven driver compatibility. Rohm's easy gate drive simplifies design and reduces cost.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use standard 18V gate drivers; no special SiC drivers required.

faqs.question: What thermal management is required for Rohm EV inverters?
faqs.answer: Rohm EV traction inverter thermal design: (1) Liquid cooling - Typical for high-power inverters >100kW. (2) Coolant - Water-glycol mixture at 60-70°C. (3) Flow rate - 10-15 L/min for 200kW inverter. (4) Thermal interface - High-performance phase-change material. (5) Heatsink - Optimized cold plate design. (6) Temperature monitoring - NTC sensors in modules. (7) Derating - Design for 150°C maximum junction for automotive reliability. Proper thermal design ensures reliable operation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use liquid cooling for inverters >100kW; design for Tj < 150°C for automotive reliability.

faqs.question: Does Rohm provide motor control software for traction inverters?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rohm provides motor control resources: (1) Control algorithms - FOC and DTC implementations optimized for SiC. (2) Reference code - Example code for popular MCUs including RH850. (3) PWM strategies - Optimized for SiC high-speed switching. (4) Protection - Overcurrent, overvoltage, overtemperature algorithms. (5) Efficiency optimization - MTPA and flux weakening. (6) Documentation - Application notes and design guides. (7) Support - FAE assistance for customization. Software resources accelerate inverter development.
faqs.decisionGuide: Start with Rohm reference code; customize for your specific motor and application.

faqs.question: What safety and reliability standards do Rohm EV solutions meet?
faqs.answer: Rohm EV safety and reliability: (1) AEC-Q101 - Automotive qualification for all EV devices. (2) IATF 16949 - Automotive quality management system. (3) Functional safety - ISO 26262 support documentation available. (4) PPAP - Full production part approval process. (5) Reliability - >1,000,000 hours MTBF proven in field. (6) Power cycling - 100,000+ cycles capability. (7) Traceability - Full lot traceability for safety. Rohm devices meet the highest automotive standards with mass production proven reliability.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rohm devices are fully qualified for automotive; all documentation available for safety systems.

solutions.title: Renewable Energy Systems
solutions.subtitle: High-Efficiency Solar Inverter Solutions
solutions.description: Rohm SiC power solutions maximize energy harvest and efficiency in solar inverters and energy storage systems with industry-leading low losses.
solutions.longDescription: Rohm's renewable energy solutions leverage SiC technology to deliver industry-leading efficiency and reliability for solar inverters and energy storage systems. With ultra-low Rds(on) MOSFETs and zero-recovery SBDs, these solutions enable >99% inverter efficiency. The solutions support power levels from residential 5kW to utility-scale 250kW+ inverters. Rohm provides comprehensive reference designs, including MPPT algorithms, grid-tie control, and anti-islanding protection.
benefits: >99% inverter efficiency for maximum energy harvest
Zero reverse recovery SBDs eliminate switching losses
50% reduction in magnetics size and cost
Higher switching frequency reduces filter size

faeInsights.content: Rohm SiC devices are excellent for solar inverter applications. The combination of SCT MOSFETs and SCH SBDs enables >99% efficiency. The zero reverse recovery of SiC SBDs is a game-changer for PFC stages. The easy gate drive compatibility makes design straightforward. For 1500V systems, use 1700V-rated devices with proper clearance design.
keyTakeaways: SiC enables >99% inverter efficiency vs 98% for IGBT
Zero reverse recovery SBDs eliminate PFC losses
Higher switching frequency reduces magnetics size by 50%
recommendations: Use SCH SBDs for boost PFC and output rectification
Implement proper EMI filtering for high-frequency switching

faqs.question: What types of solar inverters can use Rohm SiC solutions?
faqs.answer: Rohm solar inverter applications: (1) Residential - 5-10kW single-phase string inverters using discrete devices. (2) Commercial - 30-100kW three-phase string inverters. (3) Utility - 100-250kW+ central inverters using modules. (4) Microinverters - Module-level power electronics. (5) Power optimizers - DC-DC converters with MPPT. (6) Hybrid - Solar plus battery storage inverters. (7) Voltage - 1000V and 1500V DC systems supported. Rohm solutions cover all solar inverter topologies.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use discrete devices for string inverters; power modules for central inverters.

faqs.question: How does Rohm SiC improve solar inverter efficiency?
faqs.answer: Rohm SiC solar inverter efficiency benefits: (1) Conduction - Ultra-low Rds(on) reduces conduction loss. (2) Switching - Zero reverse recovery eliminates diode loss. (3) Frequency - Higher frequency reduces magnetics loss. (4) Overall - 1-2% efficiency improvement vs IGBT. (5) Energy yield - More energy harvested over system life. (6) Cooling - Reduced cooling power consumption. (7) Reliability - Lower temperature improves longevity. Rohm SiC maximizes energy harvest and ROI.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rohm SiC improves efficiency by 1-2%; significant impact on 25-year energy yield.

faqs.question: What is the advantage of using Rohm SiC SBDs in PFC circuits?
faqs.answer: Rohm SiC SBD PFC advantages: (1) Zero recovery - No Qrr-related switching losses. (2) Efficiency - 1-2% improvement in PFC efficiency. (3) Frequency - Can operate at 100kHz+. (4) Cooler - Reduced diode heating. (5) EMI - Cleaner switching waveforms. (6) Size - Smaller PFC inductor. (7) Cost - Lower system cost. SiC SBDs are ideal for boost PFC applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Rohm SCH SBDs for boost PFC to eliminate reverse recovery losses.

faqs.question: How do Rohm solutions support 1500V solar systems?
faqs.answer: Rohm 1500V solar solutions: (1) Devices - 1700V SiC MOSFETs available. (2) Benefits - Lower current, reduced losses for same power. (3) String length - Longer strings reduce BOS costs. (4) Efficiency - Higher efficiency at 1500V vs 1000V. (5) Inverters - Central inverters up to 250kW+. (6) Safety - Proper clearance and isolation design. (7) Standards - Meet IEC 62109 for 1500V systems. Rohm enables next-generation 1500V solar systems.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use 1700V SiC devices for 1500V systems; significant BOS cost savings.

faqs.question: What grid compliance standards do Rohm solar solutions meet?
faqs.answer: Rohm grid compliance: (1) IEEE 1547 - US grid interconnection standard. (2) IEC 62109 - Safety requirements for PV inverters. (3) IEC 61727 - PV system utility interface. (4) VDE-AR-N 4105 - German grid code. (5) G99/G100 - UK grid connection requirements. (6) AS 4777 - Australian standard. (7) Support - Documentation and test reports available. Rohm solutions support global grid compliance.
faqs.decisionGuide: Rohm provides documentation for major grid codes; verify specific regional requirements.

faqs.question: Can Rohm solutions be used for energy storage systems?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rohm solutions support energy storage: (1) Battery inverters - Bidirectional DC-AC conversion. (2) DC-DC converters - Battery charge/discharge control. (3) Efficiency - High round-trip efficiency critical for storage. (4) Power - Residential to utility-scale systems. (5) Batteries - Li-ion, LFP, and other chemistries. (6) Grid services - Frequency regulation, peak shaving. (7) Integration - Solar plus storage solutions. Rohm SiC efficiency maximizes storage system value.
faqs.decisionGuide: Use Rohm SiC for highest efficiency in battery inverters; bidirectional designs supported.
